bottleneck.evidence: Supersedes 20260714a documentation only: evaluate WIN geo=1.0611 minc=1.0186; integrate remains no-recipe (fused-only). Clarifies that fused-only WINs are interface-exact TRT-LLM calls, not fake wrappers.

approaches.summary: Pass device float32 bmm1_scale tensor into trtllm_batch_decode_with_kv_cache_mla instead of Python float (same solution.py as 20260714a).
approaches.why: Avoids slower static-scale FlashInfer path while matching FP8 MLA outputs.

lesson: sparse-mla-decode is intentionally fused-only: agents must NOT invent a drop-in integrate symbol. A harness WIN that keeps the FlashInfer call signature (including device tensor scales) is the production-ready claim.
transfers_to: B200 TRT-LLM sparse MLA decode tasks
caveats: Supersedes glm52--sparse_mla_decode--b200--20260714a for agent guidance; no new evaluate numbers
